debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
c : Circuit p (ZMod p)
h : rw_bisim c.eval (Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.to_cs p inst✝ (ZMod p) c))
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
ew : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w
⊢ Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e.eval = Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args

proof:
have ⟨h₁, h₂⟩ := bits_good w args e ew
      exact ⟨h₁, by rw [h₂]; simp [Exp.eval]⟩
failed_attempts:
· rw [fail h_valid]
        constructor
    case isFalse ew =>
      rw [fail (bits_bad w args e ew)]
      constructor

case isFalse ne =>
        have := bits_bad w args e ne
        contradiction
    · rw [fail H]
      split <;> constructor

· rw [fail hw]
        constructor
    case isFalse ew =>
      rw [fail (bits_bad w args e ew)]
      constructor

· rw [fail H]
        constructor
    case _ ew =>
      rw [fail (bits_bad _ _ _ ew)]
      constructor

· rw [fail h_args]
        constructor
    case _ hew =>
      rw [fail]
      · constructor
      · apply bits_bad _ _ _ hew

· rw [fail h_ok]
        constructor
    case _ hew =>
      rw [fail (bits_bad w args e hew)]
      constructor
apply bits_good _ _ _ ew

· rw [fail h_bits]
        constructor
    case _ h_range =>
      rw [fail (bits_bad w args e h_range)]
      constructor

· rw [fail H]
        constructor
    case _ ew =>
      have H := bits_bad w args e ew
      rw [fail H]
      constructor

· rw [fail h_valid]
        constructor

exact bits_good w args e ew
    case _ hnw =>
      rw [fail (bits_bad w args e hnw)]
      constructor

· rw [fail H]
        constructor
    case _ ew =>
      rw [fail (bits_bad w args e ew)]
      constructor

· rw [fail H]
        constructor
    case isFalse ew =>
      rw [fail (bits_bad w args e ew)]
      constructor

· rw [fail h_args]
        constructor
    case _ ew =>
      rw [fail]
      · constructor
      · apply bits_bad w args e ew

apply bits_good
      exact ew
    case _ new =>
      have hcond := bits_bad _ _ _ new
      rw [fail hcond]
      constructor

· rw [fail h_args]
        constructor
    case _ => constructor

· rw [fail h_bits]
        constructor
    case isFalse ew =>
      rw [fail (bits_bad w args e ew)]
      constructor

· rw [fail ha]
        constructor
    case _ hn =>
      rw [fail (bits_bad _ _ _ hn)]
      constructor

have := bits_good w args e ew
      simp [this, Exp.eval]
    case _ new =>
      rw [fail (bits_bad w args e new)]
      constructor

· rw [fail H]
        constructor
    case _ ew =>
      rw [fail (bits_bad w args e ew)]
      constructor

· rw [fail H]
        constructor

· rw [fail h']
        constructor
    case _ new =>
      have h' : ¬ (assert_bits args ∧ e.eval = bits2num args) := bits_bad w args e new
      rw [fail h']
      constructor

· rw [fail h_valid]
        constructor
    case _ ew_bad =>
      have h_invalid := bits_bad w args e ew_bad
      rw [fail h_invalid]
      constructor

· rw [fail h_args]
        constructor
    case _ => constructor

· rw [fail H]
        constructor
    case isFalse ew =>
      have H : ¬ (assert_bits args ∧ e.eval = bits2num args) := by
        intro H
        have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
          by_contra he
          apply bits_bad w args e at he
          contradiction
        contradiction
      rw [fail H]
      constructor

· rw [fail h_args]
        constructor
    case _ enw =>
      have h_bad : ¬ (assert_bits args ∧ e.eval = bits2num args) := by
        apply bits_bad
        exact enw
      rw [fail h_bad]
      constructor

· rw [fail h_valid]
        constructor
    case _ ew =>
      rw [fail]
      · constructor
      · simp [bits_bad w args e ew]

· next hew =>
        exfalso
        apply bits_bad w args e hew
        exact H
    · rw [fail H]
      split <;> constructor

· rw [fail H]
        constructor
    constructor
successful_attempts:
have ⟨h₁, h₂⟩ := bits_good w args e ew
      exact ⟨h₁, by rw [h₂]; simp [Exp.eval]⟩

have := bits_good w args e ew
      simp [this, Exp.eval]

rcases bits_good w args e ew with ⟨h₁, h₂⟩
      constructor
      · exact h₁
      · rw [h₂]; simp [Exp.eval]
